---
title : "The {{Landscape}} and {{Recent Developments}} of {{Civic}} and {{Citizenship Education Across}} the {{Latin American Region}}"
date : "2021-01-01"
author : "Sandoval-Hernandez, Andres & Miranda, Daniel"
categories : ["Book Section"]
publication : "  In Barbara Malak-Minkiewicz & Judith Torney-Purta: Influences of the {{IEA Civic}} and {{Citizenship Education Studies}} 261--275 . Cham: Springer International Publishing [https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-030-71102-3_22](https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-030-71102-3_22). ISBN: 978-3-030-71101-6 978-3-030-71102-3"
publication_short : "  In Barbara Malak-Minkiewicz & Judith Torney-Purta: Influences of the {{IEA Civic}} and {{Citizenship Education Studies}} 261--275 . Cham: Springer International Publishing [https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-030-71102-3_22](https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-030-71102-3_22). ISBN: 978-3-030-71101-6 978-3-030-71102-3"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Sandoval-Hernandez, Andres & Miranda, Daniel (2021). *The {{Landscape}} and {{Recent Developments}} of {{Civic}} and {{Citizenship Education Across}} the {{Latin American Region}}*.   In Barbara Malak-Minkiewicz & Judith Torney-Purta: Influences of the {{IEA Civic}} and {{Citizenship Education Studies}} 261--275 . Cham: Springer International Publishing [https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-030-71102-3_22](https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-030-71102-3_22). ISBN: 978-3-030-71101-6 978-3-030-71102-3

:::
